title: crepidophyllum vieillardii
intro: Crepidophyllum vieillardii, also known as Vieillard's fork fern, is a species of fern in the family Diellaceae. It is native to New Caledonia and is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Crepidophyllum vieillardii include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and protect against oxidative stress. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a decoction or infusion for medicinal purposes, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety.
